entities.name: LONGAN
entities.description: A subtropical fruit in the family Sapindaceae, characterized as an edible drupe fruit and a source of traditional medicine.

entities.name: POLYPHENOL-RICH TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of longan involving the high accumulation of polyphenolic compounds.

entities.name: TREE SIZE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of longan that poses serious problems in cultivation.

entities.name: ALTERNATE BEARING
entities.description: A fruiting pattern in longan that poses serious problems in cultivation.

entities.name: WITCHES' BROOM DISEASE
entities.description: A disease that poses serious problems for longan trees.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process used to assemble the draft genome sequence of longan.

entities.name: HONGHEZI
entities.description: A Chinese longan cultivar used for draft genome assembly.

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: Analysis performed on 13 cultivated longan accessions to reveal genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The extent of genetic variation among cultivated longan accessions.

entities.name: COMPARATIVE TRANSCRIPTOME STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis used to reveal polyphenol-rich and pathogen resistance characteristics.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to reveal polyphenol-rich and pathogen resistance characteristics.

entities.name: PATHOGEN RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of longan to resist insects, fungus, and bacteria.

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLISM
entities.description: Biological processes involved in the production of polyphenolic compounds.

entities.name: DHS
entities.description: A gene family that expanded in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: SDH
entities.description: A gene family that expanded in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: F3'H
entities.description: A gene family that expanded in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: ANR
entities.description: A gene family that expanded in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: UFGT
entities.description: A gene family that expanded in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: PAL
entities.description: A gene family that contracted in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: CHS
entities.description: A gene family that contracted in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: F3'5'H
entities.description: A gene family that contracted in longan, contributing to high polyphenol accumulation.

entities.name: POLYPHENOLIC COMPOUNDS
entities.description: Chemical compounds that accumulate in high levels in longan fruit.

entities.name: NBS-LRR
entities.description: Nucleotide-binding site leucine-rich repeat proteins providing a genomic basis for pathogen resistance.

entities.name: LEUCINE-RICH REPEAT RECEPTOR-LIKE KINASE
entities.description: Proteins providing a genomic basis for pathogen resistance.

entities.name: INSECTS
entities.description: Pathogens to which longan exhibits resistance.

entities.name: FUNGUS
entities.description: Pathogens to which longan exhibits resistance.

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Pathogens to which longan exhibits resistance.

entities.name: SAPINDACEAE
entities.description: The botanical family to which longan belongs.
